arm_grant_air_cas_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_cas_y1922_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_cas_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_cas_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_cas_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_cas_y1922_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { early_bombs = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { engines_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { range_improvements = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { supersonic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    }
}

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1926_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_large_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1955 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}







arm_grant_air_transport_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1933_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1945_road_to_56 = yes

    }

            }
            set_technology = { advanced_radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_great_leap }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { etax_great_leap = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_inclusive_science }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { etax_inclusive_science = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1934_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = butadiene_processing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { butadiene_processing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = butadiene_processing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = construction3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { construction3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = flexible_line_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { flexible_line_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = streamlined_line_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { streamlined_line_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { concentrated_industry_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dispersed_industry_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { dispersed_industry_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_the_bomb }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { etax_the_bomb = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nukes = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { rdf6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }

                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery_e }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1954 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { rocket_artillery_e = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = photo_reconnaisance }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { photo_reconnaisance = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            }
            set_technology = { SWE_bofors_antitank_gun = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1917_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1930_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1939_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1941_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1943_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = r56_gw_railway_gun }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = artillery2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { artillery2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { antiair2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

            set_technology = { sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech = 1 popup = no }

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1937_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1947_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1951 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1951_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { super_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

        if = {

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"

            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            set_technology = { AUS_alpine_warfare = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = etax_the_means }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { etax_the_means = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = jungletroops4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { jungletroops4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = shocktroops4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { shocktroops4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = jaegers4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { jaegers4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = desertinfantry_at4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { desertinfantry_at4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1930_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1939_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1942_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1943_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1945_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1949_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1950_road_to_56 = yes

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1943_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1947 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1947_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1949 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1949_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1950_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1953 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }

arm_grant_land_support_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1918_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1920 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1920_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1930 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1930_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1938_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1939_road_to_56 = yes
        }

arm_grant_land_support_y1918_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company_a = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company_a }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company_a = 1 popup = no }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1943_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_medium_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_art }

                has_dlc = "No Step Back"

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}
