arm_grant_naval_battleships_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1948_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1945_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1948_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1948_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }
            set_technology = { early_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1939_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942_road_to_56 = yes

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = degaussing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { degaussing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_naval_submarines_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1944_road_to_56 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1948_road_to_56 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922_road_to_56 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            }
            set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_submarine }

            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_aip_engine_improved_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter_road_to_56 = 1 }
